hero.title: Build with EIOSH.
hero.description: Authorised training partner, content licensee, awarding body affiliate or in-country delivery centre — we've built every model you'd expect from an approved international training centre.

intro: We partner with training centres, universities, corporates and awarding bodies in regions where we don't deliver directly. Our partnership team handles licensing, IV oversight, branded LMS deployments, and centre-approval applications.

partnerTypes.title: Authorised training partner
partnerTypes.description: Licensed to deliver EIOSH-branded preparation programmes for IOSH / NEBOSH / OSHA in your territory. Includes IV support and audit readiness.

partnerTypes.title: Content licensee
partnerTypes.description: Use our slide decks, learner workbooks and mock exam banks under your own brand. Quarterly content updates included.

partnerTypes.title: Awarding body affiliate
partnerTypes.description: We help you become an approved centre for IOSH / OSHAcademy / HABC / OTHM. End-to-end application support, mock visit included.

partnerTypes.title: Corporate university
partnerTypes.description: White-labelled HSE academy in your enterprise — courses, assessments, certificates and a dedicated tutor team.

cta.heading: Talk to the partnerships team.
cta.description: Tell us about your audience, region and the qualifications you want to bring to market — we'll come back with a model that fits.
